meta.name: viewport
meta.title: Booking Policies — Glow by Chlo · Roseville, CA

meta.name: description
meta.content: Glow by Chlo booking policies: $20 deposits, 48-hour rescheduling, age requirements, health considerations, and the 30-day replacement guarantee.
Deposits, rescheduling, ages, and guarantees — the fine print, minus the fine print energy.

div.p: Everything here exists so appointments run on time and everyone gets the same great experience.
Every appointment requires a $20 deposit at booking, processed securely through Square. Your deposit applies toward your service total — it's a hold, not an extra fee.

Reschedule free up to 48 hours before your appointment — deposits transfer to the new date. Cancellations inside 48 hours and no-shows forfeit the deposit. Life happens; if it's a true emergency, message us and we'll be human about it.
A 10-minute grace window applies to every appointment. Past that, we may need to shorten your design or rebook you so the next client starts on time.
Clients must be 18+ to book and be seen solo. Clients 16–17 are welcome with a parent or legal guardian present for the full appointment. Please bring ID.

Gems bond to clean, healthy, natural enamel. We can't place gems over active decay, on loose teeth, or during orthodontic treatment on the treated surface. Veneers and crowns are case-by-case — ask before booking and we'll advise honestly, even if the answer is "not yet."

Any gem we placed that pops off within 30 days is replaced free. After 30 days, reapplication is priced as a new single gem. The guarantee covers normal wear — it doesn't cover picking, prying, or opening bottles with your teeth (you know who you are).
Completed services are non-refundable — but if something isn't right, tell us within 48 hours and we'll make it right. Retail gem trays and party bookings follow the terms in your written quote.

Mobile visits require a clean, well-lit space with a chair and access to an outlet. Travel within 15 miles of Roseville is +$25; parties of four or more within 20 miles include travel. Quotes beyond that arrive with your confirmation.
Questions about anything here? DM @glowbychlo.co before you book — we'd rather answer twice than surprise you once.
Certified Swarovski tooth gems. Studio appointments in Roseville, mobile across the Sacramento area.
